meaning: n.节欲,戒酒,禁酒,(气候等的)温和
examples: The age of hedonism is being ushered out by a new era of temperance.
Maybe all the Temperance Taverns have got a ha'nted room, hey, Huck?
The temperance [dry; anti-alcohol] movement revived in the city.
Several decades later the epidemic has passed and a period of relative temperance sets in.
But if the worst fears of the temperance lobby are realised, fewer pills will probably be popped.
